subcodes.title: Khutbiy-i-Salavat
subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God Who hath manifested the Countenance through rapturous attractions and hath enriched the Leaf with the hidden mystery inscribed beyond [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی قد اظهر الطلعه بالجذبات و لقد اغن الورقه بالسر السطر من ورآء
subcodes.subjects: @symbolism, @praise and encouragement, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @station of the Manifestation of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prophecy and fulfillment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @chastisement and requital
